case_title: MIKE PINKERTON VS. WAG LABS, INC., ET AL

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, RE: PLAINTIFF MIKE PINKERTON'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND UNOPPOSED MOTION TO DISMISS ENTIRE ACTION [NO HEARING REQUIRED PURSUANT TO RULE 3.770(B)]. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S "UNOPPOSED MOTION TO DISMISS ENTIRE ACTION" IS GRANTED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU) ***AFTER HEARING, AN ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

Plaintiff Mike Pinkerton'S Notice Of Motion And Unopposed Motion To Dismiss Entire Action [No Hearing Required Pursuant To Rule 3.770(B)]
Off Calendar Jul-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: PLAINTIFF MIKE PINKERTON Plaintiff Mike Pinkerton'S Notice Of Motion And Unopposed Motion To Dismiss Entire Action [No Hearing Required Pursuant To Rule 3.770(B)]

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's "unopposed motion to dismiss entire action" is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed. (See scanned document for details)
